2605.01888.title: AFFormer: Adaptive Feature Fusion Transformer for V2X Cooperative Perception under Channel Impairments
2605.01888.paper_summary: Accurate 3D object detection is essential for ensuring the safety of autonomous vehicles. Cooperative perception, which leverages vehicle-to-everything (V2X) communication to share perceptual data, enhances detection but is vulnerable to channel impairments, such as noise, fading, and interference. To strengthen the reliability of intelligent transportation systems, this work improves the robustness of V2X cooperative perception under communication conditions that reflect common channel impairments. This paper proposes an Adaptive Feature Fusion Transformer (AFFormer), a Transformer-based framework that mitigates the adverse effects of corrupted features by modeling temporal, inter-agent, and spatial correlations. AFFormer introduces three key modules: Multi-Agent and Temporal Aggregation for context-aware fusion across agents and over time, Dual Spatial Attention for efficient modeling of spatial dependencies, and Uncertainty-Guided Fusion for entropy-driven refinement of fused features. A teacher-student knowledge distillation strategy further enhances robustness by aligning fused features with reliable early-collaboration supervision. AFFormer is validated on the V2XSet and DAIR-V2X datasets, where it consistently outperforms existing methods under both ideal and impaired communication conditions, demonstrating improved robustness to communication-induced feature degradation while maintaining a competitive efficiency-accuracy trade-off.
2605.01888.paper_summary_zh: 精確的 3D 物體偵測對於確保自動駕駛車輛的安全至關重要。合作感知利用車輛對所有事物（V2X）通信來共享感知數據，增強了偵測能力，但對於通道損傷，如噪聲、衰減和干擾，則較為脆弱。為了加強智能交通系統的可靠性，本研究改善了 V2X 合作感知在反映常見通道損傷的通信條件下的穩健性。本文提出了一種自適應特徵融合Transformer（AFFormer），這是一種基於Transformer的框架，通過建模時間、代理間和空間相關性來減輕受損特徵的負面影響。AFFormer 引入了三個關鍵模塊：多代理和時間聚合，用於在代理之間和隨時間的上下文感知融合；雙重空間注意力，用於高效建模空間依賴性；以及不確定性驅動的融合，用於熵驅動的融合特徵細化。一種教師-學生知識蒸餾策略進一步通過將融合特徵與可靠的早期協作監督對齊來增強穩健性。AFFormer 在 V2XSet 和 DAIR-V2X 數據集上進行了驗證，在理想和受損的通信條件下，它始終超越現有方法，顯示出對通信引起的特徵退化的改進穩健性，同時保持競爭性的效率-準確性權衡。
2605.01888.author: Xi Zhou et.al.
2605.01888.authors: Xi Zhou, Tao Huang, Qing-Long Han, Rana Abbas, Mostafa Rahimi Azghadi
